358 J3A J3A_BACK_PAIN (J3A) Back Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - back pain in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
359 J3B J3B_BONE_PAIN (J3B) Bone Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - bone pain in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
